hero.name: Javier Maroto
hero.tagline: I design, build and ship product end-to-end — from the infra to the last pixel.
hero.summary: Working with FastAPI, React 19, PostgreSQL, Docker and local LLMs. Coming from a sysadmin background, so scaling and security ride with the code, not after it.

work.title: Products I am building
work.subtitle: Seven apps, one person. Every card is a public repository with real code.

sportevent.title: SportEvent
sportevent.description: Sports event management & ticketing platform. DAW final project — defense May 2026.

winsvalinn.title: WinSvalinn
winsvalinn.description: Security auditor & optimizer for Windows. 100% local, Tauri + Python sidecar. Free and Enterprise editions.

fitdash.title: FitDash
fitdash.description: Fitness dashboard with a local multimodal AI agent (text, audio, photos, CSV) over Telegram.

cinestream.title: CineStream
cinestream.description: Personal media library with AI scene classification (YOLO) and pgvector embeddings.

portalEmployes.title: Portal-Employes
portalEmployes.description: Employee portal with payroll, time-off and announcements. In production.

servidorPi.title: servidor-pi
servidorPi.description: Home server on Raspberry Pi 5: full media stack, custom game finder and Windows agent.

pyawsPractice.title: PyAWS Practice
pyawsPractice.description: Personal prep tool for AWS Systems Engineer interviews.

stack.title: What I build with
stack.subtitle: Pragma over hype. If it does not ship, it does not enter the stack.

about.title: Engineer before developer.
about.paragraph: I am Javier, a Full-Stack engineer focused on Python and AI. I design, code and ship full products: FastAPI backends, React 19 + TypeScript frontends, PostgreSQL with pgvector, Docker-based infra and local LLMs with Ollama. With a sysadmin background, scaling, security and observability ride alongside the code from commit one.
about.based: Based in Tenerife · available remote worldwide and on-site across Europe.

sagrera.description: Linux and Windows Server infrastructure, networking, internal security auditing and support.

daw.description: Higher technical vocational degree. Final project: SportEvent (FastAPI + React 19 + Stripe).

ciso.description: Corporate IT Security Training (Chief Information Security Officer).

asir.description: Higher technical vocational degree in systems, networks and virtualization.

contact.title: Want to build something?
contact.intro: Available for remote roles worldwide and on-site opportunities in Europe and Spain. Same-day reply.
contact.shareSubtitle: Scan the QR or copy the link.

footer.built: Built with Vite, React 19, Tailwind v4 and a lot of canarian coffee.
